det_check_template:
proof fn det_NoSwitchNew(error_code: RetValueType, r1: SyscallReturnStruct, r2: SyscallReturnStruct)
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.error_code == error_code)
            &&& (r1.pcid.is_None())
            &&& (r1.cr3.is_None())
            &&& (r1.switch_decision == SwitchDecision::NoSwitch)
            &&& (r2.error_code == error_code)
            &&& (r2.pcid.is_None())
            &&& (r2.cr3.is_None())
            &&& (r2.switch_decision == SwitchDecision::NoSwitch)
        }) ==> det_NoSwitchNew_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
